MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS MARGARITA AJAMIAN AND VARTAN AJAMIAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
APPEARANCES: Nick T. Reckas, Esq. of Law Offices of Nick T. Reckas 464-0913 for pltfs & moving parties; Carlos A. Alvarez, Esq. of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez & Smith LLP 421-3400 for deft & opposing party.
